title: Keep white text on image background section, revert all other text to black

requirements.text: In the Hero section (which has the background image), keep all text — including the headline, tagline, stat labels (Years Experience, Jobs Completed, Satisfaction), and the subheading — styled as white (text-white).

quotes: keep the page with the image white and the rest turn back to black

acceptanceCriteria: All text inside the Hero component (background image section) remains white.
Stat labels 'Years Experience', 'Jobs Completed', 'Satisfaction' remain white.
Hero headline and tagline remain white.

requirements.text: In all non-Hero sections — About, Services, Contact, Footer, and Navigation — change all text that was previously overridden to white (text-white) back to black (text-gray-900 or equivalent dark/ink color), restoring the default dark text appearance.

quotes: keep the page with the image white and the rest turn back to black

acceptanceCriteria: Body text, labels, descriptions, and headings in About, Services, Contact, Footer, and Navigation sections are displayed in black or dark ink color.
No white text appears on sections that do not have a dark/image background.
The overall page is readable with dark text on light/white section backgrounds.

constraints: Do not change the PFH logo in the Navigation component.
Do not alter layout, spacing, or component structure — only text color changes are in scope.
Immutable frontend paths (hooks, main.tsx, ui components) must not be modified.
nonGoals: Changing background colors of any section.
